description: Perform an aerodynamic analysis in QBlade using the NACA 2412 airfoil imported from /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca2412.dat. Conduct an XFoil analysis with a Reynolds number of 1,000,000 (1e6) across an angle of attack range from -5 to 15 degrees. Export the resulting polar data to /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca2412_polar.txt.
